positive: A whimsical, minimalist illustration featuring a group of stylized woodland animals (a fox, a raccoon, and a deer) gathered under a massive, glowing crescent moon. The style should be highly detailed linocut engraving meets modern whimsical children's book art. The composition must be centrally focused, with strong negative space surrounding the animals and moon to ensure clean printing on fabric. Use a limited, autumnal color palette of deep forest green, burnt orange, slate grey, and cream. The silhouettes should be clean, crisp, and bold. Studio lighting setup, vector art quality, high contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel, art deco influence, 4k resolution.
negative: blurry, grain, watermark, logo, text, low contrast, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, grayscale, solid color background, messy, messy details
